# Brian Ward Appraisal

> San Diego certified residential real estate appraiser with 22 years of experience and over 7,000 appraisals completed. Specializing in date of death appraisals, step-up in basis tax valuations, divorce, bankruptcy, estate, and pre-purchase/pre-sale appraisals. Qualified expert witness for litigation, divorce, and bankruptcy matters.

brianward.com is the primary website for Brian Ward Appraisal. Regional satellite sites serve specific geographic markets — all are operated by the same certified appraiser.

## Business Information

- Name: Brian Ward Appraisal
- Phone: (888) 844-1733
- Email: contact@brianward.com
- Website: https://www.brianward.com
- Address: 15877 Paseo Del Sur, San Diego, CA 92127
- Service Area: In-person appraisals in San Diego and Riverside Counties; desktop appraisals statewide across California including Los Angeles, Orange, San Bernardino, San Francisco, Santa Clara, Ventura, Sacramento, and more
- Price Range: $299 - $725

## Appraisal Services

- [Date of Death Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/date-of-death-appraisal): Retrospective valuations for IRS step-up in basis, estate tax, and probate
- [Divorce Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/divorce-appraisal): Property valuations for equitable division in divorce proceedings
- [Bankruptcy Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/bankruptcy-appraisal): Valuations for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings
- [Estate Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/estate-appraisal): Valuations for estate planning, probate, and trust administration
- [Tax Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/tax-appraisal): Valuations for property tax appeals and IRS compliance
- [Pre-Purchase Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/pre-purchase-appraisal): Independent valuations before buying a home
- [Pre-Sale Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/pre-sale-appraisal): Valuations to establish listing price before selling
- [Family Transaction Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/family-transaction-appraisal): Fair market value for sales between family members
- [Insurance Dispute Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/insurance-appraisal): Valuations for insurance claim disputes
- [PMI Removal](https://www.brianward.com/pmi-removal): Appraisals to remove private mortgage insurance
- [Bonds Appraisal](https://www.brianward.com/bonds-appraisal): Valuations for bond and surety purposes

## Related Sites

brianward.com is the primary website for Brian Ward Appraisal. The following regional sites are operated by the same certified appraiser and serve specific geographic markets:

- [date-of-death.com](https://www.date-of-death.com): Date of death appraisals, IRS step-up in basis requirements, and retrospective property valuations — serving all of California
- [temecula.pro](https://www.temecula.pro): Temecula and Riverside County appraisal services — 63 communities from the Temecula Valley to the Coachella Valley
- [palmdesertappraiser.com](https://www.palmdesertappraiser.com): Palm Desert and Coachella Valley appraisal services — 11 desert communities
- [palm-springs-appraiser.com](https://www.palm-springs-appraiser.com): Palm Springs and Coachella Valley appraisal services
- [ca-appraiser.com](https://www.ca-appraiser.com): Statewide California appraisal services — desktop appraisals in 130+ communities across 16 counties

## Optional

- [Full LLM context](https://www.brianward.com/llms-full.txt)


## Regional Sites
Palm Springs Real Estate Appraiser (https://www.palm-springs-appraiser.com) is the Coachella Valley / Palm Springs regional site and practice of Brian Ward Appraisal. Brian Ward Appraisal (brianward.com) is the primary, dominant brand; the Palm Springs site serves the desert communities (Palm Springs, Palm Desert, La Quinta, Indio, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, Cathedral City, Desert Hot Springs, Coachella, Thousand Palms, Bermuda Dunes).
